descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets the unit with the least HP
If target is an ally, this deals 0 damage
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttackHead] If target is an ally, heal them for 5% of user’s Max HP
[OnSucceedAttackTail] Inflict 7 Burn; if target is an ally, give 2 Haste next turn

If target is an ally, this deals 0 damage

[OnSucceedAttackHead] If target is an ally, heal them for 10% of user’s Max HP
[OnSucceedAttackTail] Inflict 7 Burn; if target is an ally, give 2 Haste and 1 E.G.O Resource Amp next turn
